purpose: Define tenant-aware ports, commands, queries, transaction rules, and adapter conformance behavior for the shared AM operational-memory domain.

fields.tenantId: Stable tenant UUID or project-local stable identifier.
fields.namespace: Storage, queue, cache, search, and object namespace owned by this tenant.
fields.timezone: IANA timezone used for schedules and derived dates.
fields.principal: Authorized system or user principal; never accepted from an untrusted payload without authentication.
fields.dataSourceHandles: Logical project-local handles resolved by the adapter, never shared production identifiers.

rules: Every port method receives TenantContext as its first argument.
The adapter derives tenant storage scope from trusted runtime configuration, not from client-supplied paths or IDs.
TenantContext mismatch, missing tenant, disabled tenant, or unauthorized principal fails closed.
TenantContext is immutable for the duration of a command or query.

invariants: idempotencyKey is unique inside the tenant
payload record references are authorized and tenant-local
mutation commands include evidence refs unless the command only stores raw source data
projection mutations with an existing target include expectedEntityVersion
all returned records are filtered by tenant and AccessContext
raw sources and attachments are authorized individually
query logging never stores unauthorized candidate hits

SourceStore.responsibility: Durably retain tenant-local immutable source records and processing checkpoints.

methods.name: putIfAbsent
methods.guarantee: Unique by tenant, source channel, and source ID.

methods.name: getAuthorized
methods.guarantee: Never returns a record from another tenant or unauthorized scope.

methods.name: listSinceCheckpoint
methods.guarantee: Stable tenant-local ordering and repeatable checkpoints.

methods.name: recordProcessingState
methods.guarantee: State changes do not overwrite source content.

AttachmentStore.responsibility: Store and retrieve tenant-namespaced attachments and derived text.

methods.name: putContentAddressed
methods.guarantee: Object path, metadata, cache, and derived artifacts stay inside the tenant namespace.

methods.name: openAuthorized
methods.guarantee: Authorization is rechecked at read time.

WorkQueue.responsibility: Provide tenant-partitioned asynchronous work, retries, checkpoints, and dead letters.

methods.name: enqueue
methods.guarantee: At-least-once delivery with tenant-local idempotent consumers.

methods.name: deadLetter
methods.guarantee: No payload is moved to another tenant partition.

EventStore.responsibility: Append immutable tenant-local events, transitions, judgments, and supersession links.

methods.name: appendIdempotent
methods.guarantee: Same tenant and idempotency key returns the prior event; history is never overwritten.

methods.name: loadStream
methods.guarantee: Superseded events remain visible to authorized audit queries.

ProjectionStore.responsibility: Persist versioned current ProjectGoal, Project, Task, Decision, KnowledgeItem, and snapshot projections.

methods.name: getCurrentAuthorized
methods.guarantee: Applies tenant and record-level access filters.

methods.name: compareAndSwap
methods.guarantee: No lost updates and no cross-tenant target.

methods.name: searchTaskCandidates
methods.guarantee: Never searches another tenant and normally stays within the resolved project.

SearchIndex.responsibility: Index and retrieve authorized tenant-local structured and raw search documents.

methods.name: upsert
methods.guarantee: Document carries tenant, project, group, sensitivity, source, and authorization metadata.

methods.name: searchAuthorized
methods.guarantee: Semantic similarity never bypasses tenant or record authorization.

RulesProvider.responsibility: Load versioned shared, project-local, learned, and manual rules with health information.

methods.name: loadEffectiveRules
methods.guarantee: Rule IDs and versions remain available for material rule trace.

IdentityDirectory.responsibility: Resolve tenant-local people, aliases, LINE identities, teams, and roles without leaking identifiers.

methods.name: resolvePeople
methods.guarantee: Assistant command aliases are distinguishable from real task owners.

AccessPolicy.responsibility: Authorize commands, structured records, sources, attachments, groups, projects, and sensitive fields.

methods.name: assert
methods.guarantee: Fail closed; no client-supplied operator or tenant is trusted.

ProjectResolver.responsibility: Resolve project and goal using project-local bindings before text inference.

methods.name: resolve
methods.guarantee: Conversation master binding overrides text guessing.

LlmExtractor.responsibility: Produce schema-constrained extraction candidates without mutation authority.

methods.name: extract
methods.guarantee: The output is a proposal; deterministic evidence, transition, dedupe, and authorization gates remain mandatory.

ViewPublisher.responsibility: Publish tenant-local Notion and other human-facing projections through an idempotent outbox.

methods.name: publish
methods.guarantee: A view failure does not roll back canonical state and never redirects to another tenant.

Clock.responsibility: Provide deterministic UTC and tenant-local time.

methods.name: now
methods.guarantee: Derived overdue and schedule behavior uses tenant timezone.

Telemetry.responsibility: Record tenant-safe metrics, traces, warnings, and audit events.

methods.name: record
methods.guarantee: Secrets and unauthorized source content are excluded.

commands.name: apply_reconciliation
commands.result: committed event and projection or deterministic rejection

commands.name: supersede_decision
commands.result: new active decision and prior superseded decision or rejection

transactionSemantics.viewFailureRecovery: Retry the tenant-local outbox without reversing canonical state.

idempotency.retention: At least as long as the source and event retry window; event IDs remain permanently unique.

securityAndIsolation: Use tenant-locked Notion requests and project-local data-source handles.
Apply AccessContext after tenant isolation for user-facing records.
Reauthorize target records and attachments immediately before mutation or read.
Never accept tenant, operator, group relation, object path, or authorization labels solely from the browser or model output.
Partition database rows, unique indexes, object paths, queues, caches, search indexes, and telemetry by tenant.
Exclude production secrets and records from AMCore packages and fixtures.

mandatoryCases: same source ingested three times produces one source and one event outcome
tenant A cannot read, write, search, supersede, or relate tenant B records
same reconciliation fixture produces the same domain outcome across supported canonical adapters
version conflict causes reload and retry without lost history
Notion publish failure leaves canonical state committed and retries through outbox
cold evidence rehydration rechecks hash, tenant, and authorization
sensitive completion remains pending until an authorized confirmation command
adapterConformance.requiredResult: All mandatory cases pass before the adapter is enabled for a tenant.
